hero_desc: Freelancer, Teaching Assistant, Master's Researcher, and aspiring PhD candidate. Passionate about building modern web applications and delivering innovative digital solutions.
about_desc: I am Dr. Soliman Mohammed, an IT specialist, freelancer, and researcher. I hold a Bachelor's degree in Information Technology from Suez University with a GPA of 3.54. Currently, I am pursuing my Master's degree in Information Technology while preparing for my future PhD journey. I have worked as a Teaching Assistant at Modern Academy and Suez National University. My primary interests include Full Stack Development, Software Engineering, Scientific Research, and Freelancing.
exp_ta_desc: Worked as a Teaching Assistant at Modern Academy and Suez National University.
exp_free_desc: Providing professional Full Stack Development and technical services through freelance platforms.
exp_research_desc: Conducting scientific research in Information Technology, Cybersecurity, and Software Engineering.
service_uml_desc: Designing professional UML diagrams including Use Case, Class, Sequence, Activity, and ER diagrams for software projects.
service_web_desc: Designing and developing responsive websites using HTML5, CSS3, PHP, and MySQL.
service_translation_desc: Providing accurate translation and professional proofreading services in both Arabic and English languages.
service_pdf_desc: Converting scanned documents, PDFs, and images into fully editable Word documents with high accuracy.
service_audio_desc: Accurate transcription of lectures, interviews, and multimedia files in Arabic and English.
service_presentation_desc: Creating professional and visually appealing PowerPoint presentations in Arabic and English.
service_tutoring_desc: Providing programming tutoring and solving complex assignments, including Assembly Language and Software Engineering subjects.
service_writing_desc: Writing professional descriptions and technical content for websites, applications, and digital products.
service_cv_desc: Designing modern and professional CVs and resumes in Arabic and English.
service_reports_desc: Preparing, formatting, and professionally editing academic, technical, and business reports.
project_erp_desc: A complete enterprise resource planning system for managing inventory, sales, purchases, branches, and returns.
project_anpr_desc: Automatic Number Plate Recognition system developed as a graduation project.
project_ecommerce_desc: An online shopping platform integrated with modern payment solutions.
project_hospital_desc: A comprehensive solution for managing patients, appointments, and medical records.
project_portfolio_desc: Design and development of modern portfolio websites for individuals and businesses.
project_freelance_desc: Delivering customized software solutions tailored to clients' requirements.
certificate_huawei_desc: Huawei Certified ICT Associate (HCIA) certification from Huawei Technologies.
certificate_security_desc: Specialized training in cybersecurity and network protection.
certificate_web_desc: Advanced Full Stack Web Development training.
certificate_research_desc: Training in scientific research methodologies and academic publishing.
review1: Professional, fast response, and excellent communication.
review2: Delivered exactly what I needed on time with outstanding quality.
review3: Highly recommended. Exceptional technical expertise and professionalism.
